feed.title: AO3 - Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Little Light in the Dark
entry.summary:
Author: Stsrmoonlit

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 55,716Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 11

Summary: It's a story written about the Batman family and It's about Bruce Wayne adopting a child again with this child being different from the rest of his other adopted children and the entire Wayne family became overprotective of this child and so did their friends but this child has a secret and can she keep it from her new family or will they find out her secret and I've made my own character, hope you like this

entry.title: The Dad of the Justice League
entry.summary:
Author: PurpleButterfly19

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,629Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 252

Summary: Several times where Batman acts like a dad towards Justice League members. Hal Jordan takes notice, and soon a whole conspiracy theory is born between League Members. They think Batman is babying them! They simply don’t know he’s just a tired dad who’s prepared for anything.

entry.title: I will find you, whenever you are
entry.summary:
Author: Florchus

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,596Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 181

Summary: One accident scatters the Robins across time. Dick. Jason. Tim. Damian. Alone in unfamiliar eras, they must survive long enough to find each other again. Meanwhile, Bruce is left with silence where his family should be.

entry.title: Sawdust Eaters
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 78,967Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 43

Summary: Adrien gets added to a family group chat and he's going to make it their problem.Things take a very interesting turn as this turns out to be no ordinary family. Dick is never going to be able to visit Paris. Tim might lose his mind. Jason is having a good time.A game of Cat & Mouse begins between Adrien and Tim. What was supposed to be a simple game of chase to spice up Adrien's depressing life, becomes a whirlwind romance between the two as they chase one another across Gotham.

entry.title: Lights! Cameras! And ACTION!
entry.summary:
Author: Fishwithabow

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 59,975Chapters: 14/25Kudos: 146

Summary: You are Bruce’s Wayne only BLOOD daughter. He adopted you when you were nine following your mother’s sudden death. Your mother used to be a well known actor and so of course, like mother like daughter, you too wanted to be an actor. Your father and your new siblings for some reason tend to forget about you and end up leaving you in their dust. Will that ever change? Will you become famous before they ever notice you? Or will something happen that will change your whole view of your life? CURRENTLY REVISING STORY!! NO NEW CHAPTERS UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE!!

entry.title: helmed
entry.summary:
Author: TheResurrectionist

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,178Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 438

Summary: The man was tall. Slim in the chest, but with shoulders that gladly filled out the tactical clothing under his tac vest. The collar of his shirt ended just under his jaw, made all the more stark by the contrast of thick, silver hair above. There were a half-dozen weapons hidden on his person. His boots were reinforced at the toe and heel, the leather combat-grade and a deep, telltale black. Alfred Pennyworth walked down the center of the aisle, well-aware of the attention he’d garnered and entirely indifferent to it.

entry.title: GreeFall: Gree & The Bat-Family [S2]
entry.summary:
Author: JaggedNails

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,175Chapters: 14/14Kudos: 0

Summary: Gotham runs on routine, control, and contingency plans—until Gree. What starts as a series of small, chaotic incidents inside Wayne Manor quickly spirals into something far more unpredictable. Between pranks, patrols, near-disasters, and the occasional world-ending threat, the Batfamily finds itself adapting to a new constant: a creature who crashes through problems headfirst, loves too fiercely, and refuses to leave anything—or anyone—broken. A collection of heartfelt, interconnected stories exploring chaos, recovery, and what it means to become part of a family that was never meant to be stable in the first place.

entry.title: Chapter 8; Dynasty End
entry.summary:
Author: Corvix_Ailuranthrope_4313

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,838Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Bruce Wayne is a man, intelligent, dangerous and if the need be ruthless, but still a man, But Batman, Batman is a symbol that cannot die, for Two Hundred years, Batman has protected Gotham, from Villains, Mechas, Meteors and Dark Ages, now in The Year 200 of Batman, a New Batman arises, ready to defend a new Gotham from new threats that we both have and haven't seen.

entry.title: one time, when it all goes wrong
entry.summary:
Author: Zuribat026

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,139Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 32

Summary: Beatrice is trying, all things considered. her family feels like it's breaking apart. Clark won't speak to her right now. and things keep happening around her.she needs to help everyone around her, the same way they need to help her.before they can't anymore. i don't own any of the characters and i don't give permission for AI to use my work

entry.title: Power
entry.summary:
Author: ope-uh-oh (shortjacketlongskirt)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 208,001Chapters: 39/?Kudos: 359

Summary: “Oh, you do like to flirt, don’t you?” Lex accused almost playfully, if not for the sharklike emptiness in his eyes. Bruce sat back as the appetizer plates were taken away and replaced with the entrée: filet mignon in a mushroom gravy, served with truffles, asparagus, and black garlic potatoes. He couldn’t help but think Clark would have appreciated this. And he desperately wished he was here with him rather than Vicki. He flashed a playful grin at Lex. “Flirting is what makes the world go round, Lex. What is that quote attributed to Oscar Wilde? ‘Everything in the world is about sex except sex, which is about power’. It applies to everything. Make people think you want them, and you’ve got the whole world in your hands.” After years of living in the closet, trying to ignore the truth, Bruce is finally cornered and is forced to come out in a very public way. This leads to a series of challenges, blending his public and private life in way he can’t escape.

entry.title: a blackbird at my door, singin' nevermore
entry.summary:
Author: slightlysmilingface

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,405Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 9

Summary: It starts with Bruce. A child, unformed and scattered. A child that should, in all normal circumstances, be fine. Luck is on his side: he is a boy of privilege, wealth, and one the greatest legacy’s in America’s history. Bruce is what they are before they crack. Before trauma after trauma after trauma beats them down and wears them out and makes them something… Different. Bruce is not an alter, nor a whole person. He is a child. He is the start. *** Or, Bruce Wayne has dissociative identity disorder.

entry.title: Little B
entry.summary:
Author: Erilia_31

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,507Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 411

Summary: Bruce Wayne gets turned into his twelve years old self.I don't know what other scenarios/interactions to write for this, so I only have one chapter, but I'll make more if I think of more. Or feel free to comment ideas and I can maybe write it.I've watched Gotham before, but it was a long while ago. I'm rewatching it, but I'm only in the first few episodes, so I might get things wrong. This probably won't be very Canon to anything, but I'll try. Feel free to leave advice.

entry.title: Cursed Child
entry.summary:
Author: J4YYYZ

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,861Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 583

Summary: Bruce gets de-aged into a 16-year old after being hit by an alien weapon from an attempted invasion. The 16 year old who trained under the LOA.The 16 year old who ran away from Alfred.The 16 year old who was manipulated into something else.The 16 year old who was made a weapon.The 16 year old who never had a childhood. Bruce tries to forget the days of when he trained under Ra's, but small habits and reflexes he thought were long gone start to resurface, along with memories being freshly remembered as if it was yesterday. It haunts him slowly, eating him out from the inside before taking action after playing with its food. EDIT: currently being rewritten. Read chapter notes to see what is and what isn’t. Sorry for the confusion, i thought it was clear when it was just the notes.
